report_name: Former Ransomware Negotiator Pleads Guilty to Aiding BlackCat, Betraying Clients

threat_actors.name: BlackCat
threat_actors.description: A notorious ransomware gang that conspired with an insider, Angelo Martino, to extort higher ransom payments from victims in the hospitality, financial services, and non-profit sectors by using sensitive negotiation information. The group is also known for data exfiltration and encryption.
threat_actors.goals: To maximize financial extortion demands from victims through ransomware deployment and insider collusion.

threat_actors.name: Angelo Martino
threat_actors.description: A 41-year-old former ransomware negotiator at DigitalMint who pleaded guilty to conspiring with the BlackCat ransomware gang. He provided the gang with his clients' sensitive negotiation and insurance information to maximize extortion payments and conspired to deploy ransomware against U.S. victims.
threat_actors.goals: To profit from ransomware attacks by aiding the BlackCat gang.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: BlackCat ransomware was used to encrypt victim data as part of their extortion scheme, a typical method for this group.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over Alternative Protocol
attack_patterns.description: BlackCat's typical methods include data exfiltration before encryption to apply double extortion pressure on victims.

attack_patterns.name: Financial Theft
attack_patterns.description: Angelo Martino and the BlackCat gang conspired to maximize financial extortion demands from victims, leading to multi-million dollar ransom payments.

attack_patterns.name: Create Account
attack_patterns.description: The group, including Angelo Martino, laundered a $1.2 million Bitcoin ransom through a series of transactions, a tactic which can involve creating new accounts to obscure the flow of illicit cryptocurrency.

malware.name: BlackCat Ransomware
malware.description: The ransomware deployed by the BlackCat gang in attacks where negotiator Angelo Martino provided inside information. It was used for data encryption and extortion.

identities.name: DigitalMint
identities.description: A crypto brokerage firm that employed Angelo Martino. The firm, which helps victims pay ransoms, was betrayed by Martino who fed sensitive client information to the BlackCat gang.
